cases.name: shell-single
cases.description: List files in /tmp → expects one shell tool call

cases.name: shell-chain
cases.description: Create dir → write file → count lines (3-step chain)

cases.name: read-file
cases.description: Read a .ttl fixture and answer a question about its contents

cases.name: mixed-tools
cases.description: Uses shell + read_file in the same turn
cases.notes: shell used but read_file not called

cases.name: pod-query
cases.description: Formulates a cascade pod query shell command for conditions

cases.name: no-tool
cases.description: Factual Q&A — no tool calls should be made

cases.name: error-recovery
cases.description: Tool returns error — agent reports cleanly without infinite loop
